title: No output from switch node due to string comparison
symptom: The switch node does not produce any output when checking for text, leading to workflow execution issues.
applies_when: Using a switch node to evaluate webhook data
not_this_if: Switch node is configured correctly with valid conditions
root_cause: The switch node is comparing the string 'Text' directly to the string 'hello!', which will always fail as they are not equal. This results in no output from the switch node.
fix_steps: Use the expression {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.Text }} to check for text presence
Save the workflow and test again
agent_instruction: Modify the switch node to check for the existence of the text using the correct expression.
